name: Pumpkin Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pumpkin, 1/2 cup sugar, spices, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl and mix well.
2. Add the egg yolks, stirring until well blended. Gradually blend in the evaporated milk.
3. Pour into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake in a preheated 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) oven for 35 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
5. Remove the pie from the oven and increase the temperature to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
6. To make the meringue, beat egg whites and 1/8 teaspoon salt in a bowl using an electric mixer set on high until foamy.
7. Gradually add 6 tablespoons sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Continue beating until stiff, glossy peaks form when the beaters are slowly lifted.
9. Spoon some meringue around the edge of the warm pie and spread it so that it touches the inner edge of the crust all the way around using the back of a spoon.
10. Heap the remaining meringue in the center and push it out to meet with the meringue border.
11. Using a flatware knife, form light small peaks in the meringue.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes or until the meringue is lightly browned.
13. Cool on a wire rack.
